mapper.sql: select id, user_id, account, week_start_time, week_end_time, self_increase_points, self_expire_points, team_increase_points, team_expire_points, self_new_performance, team_new_performance, total_line_performance, max_line_performance, previous_community_performance, current_community_performance, community_new_performance, self_increase_amount, self_expire_amount, team_increase_amount, team_expire_amount, self_net_amount, team_net_amount, total_line_amount, max_line_amount, previous_community_amount, current_community_amount, community_new_amount, settle_status, batch_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, deleted from t_stake_hosting_weekly_community_performance
mapper.insert: insert into t_stake_hosting_weekly_community_performance ( user_id, account, week_start_time, week_end_time, self_increase_points, self_expire_points, team_increase_points, team_expire_points, self_new_performance, team_new_performance, total_line_performance, max_line_performance, previous_community_performance, current_community_performance, community_new_performance, self_increase_amount, self_expire_amount, team_increase_amount, team_expire_amount, self_net_amount, team_net_amount, total_line_amount, max_line_amount, previous_community_amount, current_community_amount, community_new_amount, settle_status, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{account}, #{weekStartTime}, #{weekEndTime}, #{selfIncreasePoints}, #{selfExpirePoints}, #{teamIncreasePoints}, #{teamExpirePoints}, #{selfNetPoints}, #{teamNetPoints}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{selfIncreaseAmount}, #{selfExpireAmount}, #{teamIncreaseAmount}, #{teamExpireAmount}, #{selfNetAmount}, #{teamNetAmount}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, now(), now(), 0 ) on duplicate key update account = values(account), week_end_time = values(week_end_time), self_increase_points = values(self_increase_points), self_expire_points = values(self_expire_points), team_increase_points = values(team_increase_points), team_expire_points = values(team_expire_points), self_new_performance = values(self_new_performance), team_new_performance = values(team_new_performance), self_increase_amount = values(self_increase_amount), self_expire_amount = values(self_expire_amount), team_increase_amount = values(team_increase_amount), team_expire_amount = values(team_expire_amount), self_net_amount = values(self_net_amount), team_net_amount = values(team_net_amount), update_time = now()
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(ifnull(o.performance_points, 0)), 0) from t_stake_hosting_order o inner join t_user_relation r on r.pos_user_id = o.user_id and r.par_user_id = #{userId} and r.distance > 0 and r.active_flag = 1 where o.deleted = 0 and o.pay_status = 1 and o.performance_start_time between #{weekStartTime} and #{weekEndTime}

select ifnull(sum(ifnull(o.performance_points, 0)), 0) from t_stake_hosting_order o inner join t_user_relation r on r.pos_user_id = o.user_id and r.par_user_id = #{userId} and r.distance > 0 and r.active_flag = 1 where o.deleted = 0 and o.pay_status = 1 and o.performance_end_time between #{weekStartTime} and #{weekEndTime}

select ifnull(sum(ifnull(o.stake_usdt_amount, 0)), 0) from t_stake_hosting_order o inner join t_user_relation r on r.pos_user_id = o.user_id and r.par_user_id = #{userId} and r.distance > 0 and r.active_flag = 1 where o.deleted = 0 and o.pay_status = 1 and o.performance_start_time between #{weekStartTime} and #{weekEndTime}

select ifnull(sum(ifnull(o.stake_usdt_amount, 0)), 0) from t_stake_hosting_order o inner join t_user_relation r on r.pos_user_id = o.user_id and r.par_user_id = #{userId} and r.distance > 0 and r.active_flag = 1 where o.deleted = 0 and o.pay_status = 1 and o.performance_end_time between #{weekStartTime} and #{weekEndTime}
